scripts.test: docker compose exec -T -e BCOEM_DB_HOST=db web vendor/bin/phpunit
test:db: docker compose exec -T -e BCOEM_DB_HOST=db web vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite Integration
docker compose exec -T -e BCOEM_DB_HOST=db web vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite Approval
scripts.e2e:install: sh -c 'cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright install chromium'
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d

scripts-descriptions.stan: Run PHPStan on the host (level 0 over lib/).
scripts-descriptions.test: Run the full 3-tier PHPUnit suite inside the web container (stack must be up).
scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Run just the DB-free Unit tier on the host (no Docker needed).
scripts-descriptions.test:db: Run the Integration + Approval tiers inside the web container.
scripts-descriptions.e2e: Run the Playwright e2e suite against the running stack (passes extra args through).
scripts-descriptions.e2e:install: One-time: install e2e npm deps and the Chromium browser.
scripts-descriptions.db:reset: Wipe and re-seed the Docker DB volume (clean fixtures).
scripts-descriptions.ci: Run everything CI runs: PHPStan, full PHPUnit, and e2e.
scripts-descriptions.report: Generate a report of the current project dependencies and their licenses.
